insight: Items placed in Boss drop menus are saved as exact ItemStack snapshots, so custom item plugins with random stats (e.g. MMOItems) get their stats frozen at the moment of configuration. Fix: reward via a death command instead, e.g. `mmoitems give <TYPE> <ID> {killer}`, which regenerates the item fresh with rerolled stats on every kill; each death command also has its own in-game Run Chance (0-100%) for chance-based rewards, so no code change is needed for "X% chance" requests.

Top damager commands (Drops.Player_Commands) are NOT limited to one command: Boss splits the stored string on `|` (Boss.getPlayerDropsCommands), so users can chain multiple commands per damage rank. Inside these commands `{killer}` resolves to the ranked damager receiving the reward (not the actual killer), and `{order}` plus `{damage}` are also replaced per recipient.
